message:
fix(runtime,widgets): NaN safety guards, cascade validation, and widget behavior corrections

Runtime NaN safety:
- conformal_alert: Guard CalibrationStats::update() and ConformalAlert::observe()
  against NaN inputs. NaN values are silently dropped from calibration and return
  an InvalidObservation no-alert decision.
- flake_detector: Guard FlakeDetector::observe() against NaN residuals, returning
  a neutral FlakeDecision without updating internal state.
- policy_config: Validate cascade.min_trigger_level <= cascade.max_degradation.

Widget behavior fixes:
- input.rs: Correct word-movement and delete_word_back test expectations. Fix
  oversized paste to leave selection intact rather than replacing.
- toast.rs: Check dismissed state in handle_key() early return.
- wrap_repro.rs: Update expected output for preserve_indent=false default.
- lib.rs (ftui-tty): Increase mouse coordinate test values to (700,500).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
